assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 31-35 show 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205' and explicitly state 'Check out the feature branch **TC-9005** (the Target Branch from the task description)'. The checkout is TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 78-83 show 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column" --body "..."' and state 'The PR targets **--base TC-9005** (the feature branch), not main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 34 shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and line 39 states 'Create a new task branch named **TC-9205** (the Jira issue ID for this task)'. The task branch TC-9205 is distinct from the target branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 13-23 under 'Step 4 -- Understand the Code (Pre-Implementation Inspection)' explicitly list all three files: (1) 'Read migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs', (2) 'Read entity/src/advisory.rs', (3) 'Read migration/src/lib.rs'. file-1-description.md lines 9-11 also specify pre-implementation inspection of migration/src/lib.rs. file-2-description.md lines 9-12 specify reading m0001_initial/mod.rs and entity/src/advisory.rs before creating the file.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 74 states: 'With flag: `--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"`'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 63-72 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' (Conventional Commits format with type=feat, scope=migration) and the footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 8-9 under 'Target Branch Extraction' state: 'The task description specifies **Target Branch: TC-9005**. This is a feature branch (not main), indicating the feature-branch workflow. All branch operations and PR targeting must use TC-9005 as the base.'
